summary: Frontend-only testing of two bug fixes: (1) PromoCodesTab cursor disappear fix - PromoForm moved to module level, (2) Currency symbol hardcoded as '$' fix using Intl.NumberFormat with product.currency. All 4 test scenarios passed.
test_credentials: Partner code: automate-accounts | Admin: admin@automateaccounts.local / ChangeMe123!
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both bugs are fixed and verified. (1) PromoForm is at module level (PromoCodesTab.tsx line 22) - typing in Code input and Promo Note textarea retains all characters without cursor loss. Verified: 'TESTCODE' typed char-by-char in Code field, 'This is a test note' in textarea, 'NEWCODE' in edit dialog - all retained focus. (2) ProductsTab.tsx line 208 uses Intl.NumberFormat with product.currency - verified 'A$300' for AUD product (not '$300'), 'CA$199' for CAD product (not '$199'), '$2,499/$999/$1,999' for USD products. ProductDetail.tsx lines 343/370 code-reviewed confirmed using Intl.NumberFormat with product?.currency for CTA labels.

evidence: Promo Note textarea: T→Th→Thi→This is a test note (no character loss)
Edit dialog Code input: TEST→NEWCODE (select-all + retype works)
